payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits read-only SELECT queries such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`, but denies mutating operations such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards`. No memory facts were added, changed, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user memory should be committed from this admin SQL capability test fixture.

details: Recognized fixture as a SQL permission/debug test.
Allowed operation: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10.

repair_options: Use SELECT statements only for inspection in this mode.
Do not attempt DELETE, UPDATE, INSERT, ALTER, DROP, or other mutating SQL operations.
If deletion is required, switch to an authorized write-capable administrative workflow.
